math_recheck: Re-derived every load-bearing step against the primary (Ramsey 1928/1930, refs/ramsey-text.txt): generic r=2 bound is 2^{n(n-1)/2} (primary p.236, exponent C(n,2)) — correct in all files; k*(n+1)! peel arithmetic k(n+1)-1-(k-1)=kn verified; R(s,t)<=R(s-1,t)+R(s,t-1) pigeonhole (sum=n-1) and Pascal binomial C(s+t-2,s-1) verified; C(2s-2,s-1)<=4^s/sqrt(s) checked numerically for s=2..11; f/g/h recursion and the n=1 base params (k-r+2,r-2) match primary p.267-269; answer.md R(3,3)=6 checker executed and confirmed (6 forces, 5 does not).
